untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implied volatility (IV) rank thresholds, IV absolute decline measurements, pre-event timing filters (days_before_event), and time-spread-specific vega calculations. These are options-chain metrics not available in the standard price/technical indicator set. The india_vix proxy and hvol_20 are approximate substitutes for volatility regime detection, but cannot capture: (1) IV rank percentile calculations, (2) time spread IV premium differential (long-short legs), (3) vega exposure quantification, (4) scheduled event calendar integration, (5) underlying stability filters beyond ATR. A proper implementation requires direct access to implied volatility surface data and options Greeks.
translation_notes: Approximated using india_vix (volatility proxy) for elevated IV entry condition and hvol_20 (historical volatility) for both entry stability and exit contraction signals. ATR condition is placeholder for 'minimal movement' requirement. The core logic (pre-event vol expansion → post-event vol contraction) is partially captured but lacks true IV rank and spread-specific mechanics.
